title: Deploying Server Pages and Web Services on iSeries
breadcrumbs: Installing and Configuring Uniface on iSeries
Deploying Server Pages and Web Services on iSeries
text: Deploying Server Pages and Web Services on iSeries For Uniface on the iSeries to run Uniface dynamic and static server pages and web services, you need to move the UAR containing the server pages or Web services and their associated files and signatures onto your iSeries, and set the appropriate assignment file settings. Note: For purposes of illustration in the following procedure, we are creating a test service called websrv.svc , deploying it on the iSeries, and running it as a web service. The service will be called from a form running in the Uniface IDE on a Windows client. Configure the Uniface Web Application Server on iSeries Create and Run a Test Service on iSeries Run the Service as a Web Service Related Links Static Server Pages Static Server Page (USP) components generate a complete web page every time they are activated. This makes them useful for relatively static web pages or a thin-client architecture in which all processing is done on the server. They can also be used for RESTful applications or file upload functionality. Web Services A web service is software that makes its functionality available over the Internet. Was this topic helpful?
